sentences.text: This section describes the ext:c[] extension, which incorporates the compressed instruction-set extensions designed for application- and server-class processors.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:c[] Extension for Compressed Instructions

sentences.text: The ext:c[] extension substantially improves code density across a wide range of applications, thereby improving performance, area-efficiency, and energy-efficiency of processors with instruction caches.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:c[] Extension for Compressed Instructions

sentences.text: It excludes features that improve code density at the cost of performance.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:c[] Extension for Compressed Instructions

sentences.text: The ext:c[] extension depends upon the extlink:zca[] extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:c[] Extension for Compressed Instructions

sentences.text: If XLEN=32 and the F extension is present, the ext:c[] extension additionally depends upon the extlink:zcf[] extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:c[] Extension for Compressed Instructions

sentences.text: If the D extension is present, the ext:c[] extension additionally depends upon the extlink:zcd[] extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:c[] Extension for Compressed Instructions
